snowflake:select.doc:name: verify customer detsiles exist or not

ee:transform.doc:name: transform db array payload into json

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive account deatiles by mobilenumber
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT FULLNAME, ACCOUNTNUMBER, STATUS, BALANCE, EMAIL, BANKNAME, ADDRESS, ADHARNUMBER, CREATED_AT, MOBILENUMBER FROM BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA WHERE MOBILENUMBER = :mobileNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var customer = payload[0] default {} var acc = (customer.ACCOUNTNUMBER default "") as String var adhar = (customer.ADHARNUMBER default "") as String
--- { mobileNumber: customer.MOBILENUMBER default "", customerName: customer.FULLNAME default "Customer",
accountNumber: if(sizeOf(acc) >= 4) "XXXXXX" ++ acc[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
accountType: customer.STATUS default "N/A",
balance: customer.BALANCE default 0,
email: customer.EMAIL default "N/A",
bankName: customer.BANKNAME default "Real Bank",
address: customer.ADDRESS default "N/A",
adharNumber: if(sizeOf(adhar) >= 4) "XXXXXXXX" ++ adhar[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
createdAt: customer.CREATED_AT default "" }

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded --- { token: p("ultramsg.token"), to: "91" ++ vars.mobileNumber, body: "🏦 Real Bank

" ++ "Dear " ++ payload.customerName ++ "

" ++ "🏦 Bank : " ++ payload.bankName ++ "
" ++ "👤 Customer : " ++ payload.customerName ++ "
" ++ "📱 Mobile : " ++ payload.mobileNumber ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account : " ++ payload.accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📊 Status : " ++ payload.accountType ++ "
" ++ "💰 Balance : ₹" ++ (payload.balance as String) ++ "
" ++ "📧 Email : " ++ payload.email ++ "
" ++ "🏠 Address : " ++ payload.address ++ "
" ++ "🆔 Aadhaar : " ++ payload.adharNumber ++ "
" ++ "📅 Created : " ++ (payload.createdAt as String) ++ "

" ++ "Thank you for banking with Real Bank." }]

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive transacctions data by mobilenumber

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var rows = payload default [] var customer = rows[0] default {}
var account = (customer.ACCOUNTNUMBER default "") as String var adhar = (customer.ADHARNUMBER default "") as String var mobile = (customer.MOBILENUMBER default "") as String var email = (customer.EMAIL default "") as String
--- { mobileNumber: mobile, customerName: customer.FULLNAME default "Customer",
accountNumber: if (sizeOf(account) >= 4) "XXXXXX" ++ account[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
accountStatus: customer.STATUS default "N/A", currentBalance: customer.BALANCE default 0,
email: if (email contains "@") email[0 to 1] ++ "******@" ++ ((email splitBy "@")[1]) else "Not Available",
bankName: customer.BANKNAME default "Real Bank",
address: if ((customer.ADDRESS default "") != "") "************" else "Not Available",
adharNumber: if (sizeOf(adhar) >= 4) "XXXXXXXX" ++ adhar[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
createdAt: customer.CREATED_AT default "",
transactions: rows map (item) -> { transactionType: item.TRANSACTIONTYPE, amount: item.AMOUNT, balanceAfterTransaction: item.BALANCEAFTERTRANSACTION, timestamp: item.TIMESTAMP } }

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded
var txns = if (isEmpty(payload.transactions default [])) "No recent transactions." else (payload.transactions map (t,index) -> (index + 1) as String ++ ". " ++ (t.transactionType default "") ++ " | ₹" ++ (t.amount as String) ++ " | Balance: ₹" ++ (t.balanceAfterTransaction as String) ++ " | " ++ (t.timestamp as String) ) joinBy "
"
--- { token: p("ultramsg.token"),
to: "91" ++ (payload.mobileNumber as String),
body: "🏦 *REAL BANK*

" ++ "👤 Customer: " ++ payload.customerName ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account: " ++ payload.accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📱 *Mobile:* " ++ (payload.mobileNumber default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📌 *Status:* " ++ (payload.accountStatus default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📧 *Email:* " ++ (payload.email default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "🏠 *Address:* " ++ (payload.address default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📅 *Account Created:* " ++ ((payload.createdAt default "") as String) ++ "

" ++ "🏦 *Bank:* " ++ (payload.bankName default "Real Bank") ++ "
" ++
"💰 Balance: ₹" ++ (payload.currentBalance as String) ++ "

" ++ "📜 Last Transactions
" ++ txns }]

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

logger.doc:name: Before database inside balance choice router

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive the account data by the user mobile number
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT FULLNAME, ACCOUNTNUMBER, BALANCE, BANKNAME, MOBILENUMBER FROM BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA WHERE MOBILENUMBER = :mobileNumber;

logger.doc:name: after retrive data the output of data base is array transform into json

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded
// Safely extract mobile number from array or fallback to "N/A" var mobileNumber = if (payload.mobileNumber is Array) (payload.mobileNumber[0] as String) default "N/A" else (payload.mobileNumber as String) default "N/A"
// Use default values for potentially null fields var customerName = payload.FULLNAME[0] default "N/A" var accountNumber = payload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] default "N/A" var bankName = payload.BANKNAME[0] default "N/A" var balance = payload.BALANCE[0] default "N/A" --- { token: p("ultramsg.token"), to: "91" ++ mobileNumber, body: "👤 Customer: " ++ customerName ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account: " ++ accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📱 *Mobile:* " ++ mobileNumber ++ "
" ++ "💰 Balance: ₹" ++ balance ++ "

" ++ "🏦 *Bank:* " ++ bankName ++ "
" }]
